creator: kristinacors
caption: Did you know about this Michelin recognized Thai food spot in New York City? #travelbucketlist #travelcontentcreator #nycrestaurants #nycitinerary #bestrestaurantsnyc Soothr LIC

transcription.text: This might be the best Thai restaurant in New York City. It's Michelin-recognized, and no one is talking about it. By the way, I also love that the ambiance is on point. We started off with these really cool gemstone-inspired cocktails, which were super good and pretty. So we were already off to a good start. And then the food came out. And to say we were blown away was an understatement. The roasted duck was so incredibly tender, and it was rich, flavorful, slightly crispy on the outside. Just perfect. All the food across the board just hit. I just can't get over how every bite was packed with such deep, savory flavor. And I honestly don't think words will do it justice. Like, this is the kind of meal you keep thinking about after you leave. Also, I thought it was so cool that they have two restaurants, but they offer things on this menu that you can only get at this location. And vice versa. The name of this restaurant is Soother in Long Island City. And by the way, they even have a jazz night on Tuesdays. But I missed it because I went too early. Anyway, save this because you're gonna want to come here. And follow for more travel gems in New York City and around the world.
